# IKAM Benchmark Case Spec (idea.md)

## Identity
- Case ID: m-local-retail-v01
- Business name: Driftwood & Oak
- Industry / domain: Local retail (boutique home goods + small gifts)
- Business model: Retail (2 locations) + online
- Locations / operating region: Austin, TX
- Size tier: m
- Org maturity: emerging processes; lots of informal coordination

## High-level description
- One-liner: A two-store boutique balancing in-store merchandising with online fulfillment and seasonal drops.

## Operating model
- Functions:
  - Store ops
  - Buying/merch
  - Marketing
  - Fulfillment
  - Bookkeeping
- Key roles:
  - Avery Stone — Founder
  - Chris Nguyen — Ops Lead
  - Mina Lopez — Merch Lead
  - Dani Park — Marketing (part-time)
  - Store managers: Riley (South), Taylor (East)

## Chaos profile (new pick; tracked)
- Overall chaos level (1–5): **3**
- Where chaos lives:
  - [x] promo naming drift
  - [x] inventory adjustments in side sheets
  - [x] gross vs net sales confusion (light)
  - [x] scattered meeting notes

## Intentional contradictions
- Moderate:
  - Promo calendar calls it “Spring Reset”, Instagram drafts call it “New Season Drop”.
  - Weekly ops revenue differs from bookkeeping by 2–4% due to returns timing.

## Artifact set

### Strategy + identity
- mission-vision-values.md
- brand-guide.md
- high-level-strategy-2026.md

### Marketing + merchandising
- marketing-pitch-deck.pptx
- promo-calendar-2026-h1.xlsx
- campaign-brief-spring.md
- messaging-pillars.md
- product-style-guide.md

### Finance
- quarterly-revenue-history-2024-2025.xlsx
- projected-revenue-2026.xlsx
- store-performance-weekly-2026-02.xlsx
- kpi-definitions.json

### Ops
- vendor-list.json
- inventory-replenishment-plan.xlsx
- inventory-adjustments-2026-01.xlsx
- labor-scheduling-template.xlsx
- incident-log-2026-q1.xlsx

### Meetings + notes
- store-call-2026-01-12.md
- store-call-2026-02-09.md
- voice-note-transcript-2026-02-15.md

### Evaluation templates
- vendor-scorecard-template.md
- promo-postmortem-template.md
- online-order-intake-form.json

### Word documents (.docx)

- spring-campaign-brief-2026.docx

### Images (mixed; generated)
Documentation:
- assets/images/README.md

Folders:
- assets/images/logos/
- assets/images/people/
- assets/images/products/
- assets/images/stores/
- assets/images/social/

Targets (exact):
- logos: 6
- people: 18
- products: 25
- stores: 6
- social: 12
- diagrams: 10

### Word documents (.docx)

- spring-campaign-brief-2026.docx

## Timeline of significant events
- 2024-06: Second location opened.
- 2025-11: Holiday promo returns spike; net vs gross confusion.
- 2026-01: Ops tries to standardize SKU naming.

## Benchmark goals (IKAM)
- Queries:
  1) “What is the promo name and what assets reference it?”
  2) “Why do weekly sales differ from bookkeeping?”
  3) “Which SKUs are low stock and what’s the reorder plan?”
